en_title: Psychonauts Developer Double Fine Responds to Closure Reports With a Single Emoji
cn_title: 《意航员》开发商用emoji回应关闭传闻
subtitle: 看点来了
opus_summary: Double Fine工作室近日对可能被关闭的报道做出回应，仅发布了一个😅表情。该工作室是微软旗下多家与Xbox谈判寻求避免关闭的工作室之一。

paragraphs.en: Psychonauts developer Double Fine has responded to the reports of its potential closure with a single emoji.
paragraphs.cn: 《意航员》开发商Double Fine用一个表情符号回应了可能关闭的报道。

paragraphs.en: The San Francisco studio is one of a number of Microsoft-owned developers reportedly fighting for their future amid a significant shakeup at Xbox that is expected to result in layoffs across the gaming business later this month. Hellblade developer Ninja Theory, which announced its new game Senua at Xbox Games Showcase just over a week ago, and South of Midnight maker Compulsion are also reportedly in negotiations with Microsoft over a potential buyout in a bid to avoid closure.
paragraphs.cn: 这家旧金山工作室是微软旗下多家被传正在为生存而战的工作室之一。Xbox正经历重大重组，预计本月晚些时候将导致游戏业务大范围裁员。《地狱之刃》开发商Ninja Theory（一周多前刚在Xbox游戏展示会上公布了新作《塞娜》）和《午夜之南》开发商Compulsion据报道也在与微软谈判，希望通过买断来避免关闭。

paragraphs.en: Tim Schafer’s Double Fine is perhaps most famous for the Psychonauts franchise. Microsoft bought the studio in June 2019 and signed on as Psychonauts 2 publisher. Double Fine then released Keeper in 2025 and Kiln earlier this year, both of which were not commercial hits.
paragraphs.cn: Tim Schafer的Double Fine最出名的可能是《意航员》系列。微软于2019年6月收购了该工作室，并担任了《意航员2》的发行商。Double Fine随后在2025年发布了《Keeper》，今年早些时候发布了《Kiln》，这两款游戏都未成为商业爆款。

paragraphs.en: Yesterday, The Game Business reported that Xbox Game Studios boss Craig Duncan had stepped down. News of various Microsoft studios potentially closing down was not far behind. IGN has asked Microsoft for comment but it is yet to respond.
paragraphs.cn: 昨天，The Game Business报道称Xbox游戏工作室负责人Craig Duncan已辞职。随后便传出了多家微软工作室可能关闭的消息。IGN已联系微软置评，但尚未收到回复。

paragraphs.en: Double Fine did issue a single emoji social media post, summing up how it feels right now: a smiling face with open mouth and cold sweat.
paragraphs.cn: Double Fine确实在社交媒体上发布了一个表情符号帖子，总结了它此刻的感受：一张微笑着张着嘴、冷汗直流的脸。

paragraphs.en: According to Bloomberg , Compulsion, Ninja Theory, and Double Fine aren’t the only Microsoft studios currently negotiating with Xbox to try to avoid closure. There is the potential for some or all to buy their way to independence, although that would likely come alongside layoffs, too.
paragraphs.cn: 据彭博社报道，Compulsion、Ninja Theory和Double Fine并非微软旗下唯二在与其谈判试图避免关闭的工作室。其中一家或所有工作室都有可能通过买断实现独立，尽管这可能也会伴随裁员。

paragraphs.en: Earlier this month, new Xbox boss Asha Sharma warned of a company "reset" that most took as a signal that Microsoft planned big layoffs and studio closures. "the studios most exposed are brilliant for prestige and rotten for the spreadsheet." Microsoft was then said to be speeding up development on new The Elder Scrolls, Fallout, and Halo games as it considered restructuring or even spinning off its gaming branch.
paragraphs.cn: 本月初，Xbox新负责人Asha Sharma警告公司面临「重置」，多数人将此解读为微软计划大规模裁员和关闭工作室的信号。「风险最大的工作室，在声望方面很出色，在财务数据上却很糟糕。」随后有消息称，微软在考虑重组甚至拆分游戏部门的同时，正在加快开发新的《上古卷轴》《辐射》和《光环》游戏。

paragraphs.en: Sharma's ground-shaking memo revealed that Microsoft's gaming business currently has a 3% accountability margin (assumed to mean profit margin), which is down year-on-year. "Excluding Activision Blizzard King, over the past five years, we have spent over $20 billion on ongoing investments in our content, platform, and hardware subsidy, but our annual revenue has declined nearly half a billion during that time. Going forward, this cannot continue," Sharma said.
paragraphs.cn: Sharma那封撼动公司的备忘录透露，微软游戏业务目前的问责利润率（据推测为利润率）为3%，同比下降。Sharma说道：「剔除动视暴雪和King，过去五年我们在内容、平台和硬件补贴上持续投入超过200亿美元(约合人民币1354亿元)，但我们的年收入同期却下降了近5亿美元(约合人民币34亿元)。往后，这不能再继续下去了。」

paragraphs.en: Following the release of the memo, Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella said "there's more monetization of Xbox games happening on YouTube" than at Xbox , adding that the Xbox team needed to figure out how to "innovate both in hardware, as well as in the games, going forward in an economically viable way."
paragraphs.cn: 备忘录发布后，微软CEO Satya Nadella表示，「Xbox游戏在YouTube上的变现比在Xbox上还多」，并补充说Xbox团队需要想办法，「在硬件和游戏两方面都以经济上可行的方式进行创新。」

paragraphs.en: "No one can accuse Microsoft of not having invested for the last 25 years," Nadella added. "Now, we have to turn this into a sustainable business that delivers what is fundamentally one of the best sources of entertainment, still."
paragraphs.cn: Nadella补充道：「没有人能指责微软过去25年来没有投入。现在，我们必须将其转变为一个可持续的业务，它从根本上仍然是最好娱乐来源之一。」

paragraphs.en: This week’s news marks a significant U-turn on Xbox brand sentiment, after Sharma had started to turn core fans around with a number of crowd-pleasing changes such as the decision to make The Coalition's Gears of War: E-Day and inXile's Clockworld Revolution console exclusives. The Xbox layoffs are expected to come into effect at the end of Microsoft's financial year on June 30.
paragraphs.cn: 本周的消息标志着Xbox品牌情绪的显著逆转，此前Sharma通过一系列讨好玩家的举措，如决定将The Coalition的《战争机器：事变日》和inXile的《发条革命》设为Xbox主机独占，已开始扭转核心粉丝的看法。Xbox的裁员预计将在微软财年结束的6月30日生效。
图片由Christian Petersen / Getty Images提供。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在Twitter上找到他，账号为 @wyp100；也可以通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com或保密邮箱wyp100@proton.me与他联系。
